svg.title: Country geography and feasible-candidate exposure
svg.desc: Separate Tukey boxplots for legacy and inter-region candidate-exposure rates.
svg.text: Rate sources are separated because their exposure semantics are not interchangeable.
Boxes show Q1–Q3; center line is median; whiskers use 1.5×IQR; dots are sampled outliers.
Rate source kept separate; values are candidate exposure, not observed cable use.
Rate source kept separate; values are candidate exposure, not observed cable use.
